---
title: "New tools of the trade? The potential and pitfalls of’Machine Learning’and’DAGs’ to model origin-destination data"
description: "Robin Lovelace and Ilan Fridman-Rojas (2017). New tools of the trade? The potential and pitfalls of’Machine Learning’and’DAGs’ to model origin-destination data. *GeoComputation 2017*."
date: "2017-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_new_2017"
citation-type: "paper-conference"
citation-type-label: "Conference Paper"
venue: "GeoComputation 2017"
doi: ""
publication-url: ""
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
  - "Ilan Fridman-Rojas"
---

**Type:** Conference Paper
**Venue:** GeoComputation 2017
**Year:** 2017

[BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Robin Lovelace and Ilan Fridman-Rojas (2017). New tools of the trade? The potential and pitfalls of’Machine Learning’and’DAGs’ to model origin-destination data. *GeoComputation 2017*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@inproceedings{lovelace_new_2017,
  title = {New Tools of the Trade? {{The}} Potential and Pitfalls of'{{Machine Learning}}'and'{{DAGs}}' to Model Origin-Destination Data},
  shorttitle = {New Tools of the Trade?},
  booktitle = {{{GeoComputation}} 2017},
  author = {Lovelace, Robin and {Fridman-Rojas}, Ilan},
  editor = {Long, Rob},
  year = {2017},
  publisher = {{Centre for Computational Geography, University of Leeds}},
  copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
  file = {/home/robin/Zotero/storage/6EXFI7ZR/Lovelace et al. - 2017 - New tools of the trade The potential and pitfalls.pdf;/home/robin/Zotero/storage/HMFQBN8S/124286.html}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
